name: bowen-bd/atomisticskills
description: AtomisticSkills MCP Server: AI tools for atomistic simulations, DFT, MLIPs, and generative models.

environmentVariables.name: MP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API Key for Materials Project access. Required by base-server for querying bulk structures. Get a key at https://materialsproject.org/api

environmentVariables.name: OPENALEX_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email address to access the OpenAlex Polite Pool. Register your email for free at https://docs.openalex.org/how-to-use-the-api/rate-limits-and-authentication#the-polite-pool

environmentVariables.name: ATOMATE2_REMOTE_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: Default project name for remote job submission (auto-detected if blank). Required by atomate2-server.

environmentVariables.name: VASP_CMD
environmentVariables.description: Command to run VASP. Required by atomate2-server if running locally.

environmentVariables.name: PMG_VASP_PSP_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to VASP POTCAR directory. Required by pymatgen and atomate2-server.
